title: Attachments — document RAG + image vision (manual attach)
description: Attachments are outside the deep-link action grammar, so every point here is navigate-then-attach-by-hand: the actions land you on a fresh chat and the summary tells you what to attach. Covers the client-side document parse + RAG-excerpt block and the multimodal vision path.

points.label: Document RAG: answer cites the attached file
points.summary: Attach a PDF or DOCX via the paperclip BY HAND, then ask about its contents. The reply should quote/summarize the REAL document (its text travels inside the message; large docs are indexed and retrieved). PASS = grounded in the file; FAIL = a generic answer ignoring the attachment.

actions.text: Attach a short PDF/DOCX via the paperclip, then ask: 'Summarize the key points of the attached document.'

points.label: Vision: model reads an attached image
points.summary: Attach a photo BY HAND, then ask what's in it. The multimodal path should describe the actual image contents. PASS = an accurate description of the attached image; FAIL = a refusal or a description of something not in the image.

actions.text: Attach a clear photo via the paperclip, then ask: 'What is shown in this image?'
